versions.description: Initial build — Author section, changelog, multi-layer graph filters
Stability, performance, security, UX, code quality, new features
GitHub-ready bootstrap — fresh clones work without crashes; cross-platform setup scripts; 00-TEMPLATE blueprint; .gitkeep scaffolding for 99-SYSTEM-BACKEND and INCOMING

Security hardening: Pydantic v2 ToolExecReq schema + orchestration interceptor (10-tool allowlist, per-tool arg schemas, length caps, path-traversal + NUL-byte blocks, project/system-file allowlists); SSRF guard wired into ai_respond and research_web_import (private-IP and forbidden-scheme rejection); 21/21 smoke tests pass
